title: Why This Is the Most Exciting Time to Be Human | Ken Ono, Axiom Math
summary: Ken Ono argues that humans cannot win a race to compete with AI on knowledge retention, and that true intelligence in the age of AI lies in curiosity, judgment, and discovery rather than rote knowledge. He draws on Ramanujan's legacy to illustrate how genius and unconventional thinking remain distinctly human strengths that machines cannot replicate.
